Package com.rays.common

Class BaseDAOImpl<T extends BaseDTO>

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.rays.common.BaseDAOImpl<T>
  • Type Parameters:
    T - the DTO type extending BaseDTO
    All Implemented Interfaces:
    BaseDAOInt<T>
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    AttachmentDAOImpl, CollegeDAOImpl, CourseDAOImpl, FacultyDAOImpl, MarksheetDAOImpl, RoleDAOImpl, StudentDAOImpl, SubjectDAOImpl, TimetableDAOImpl, UserDAOImpl
    public abstract class BaseDAOImpl<T extends BaseDTO>
extends java.lang.Object
implements BaseDAOInt<T>
    Abstract base implementation of BaseDAOInt providing common JPA-based data access operations for all DAO classes in the ORS application.

    Subclasses must implement getDTOClass() and getWhereClause(T, javax.persistence.criteria.CriteriaBuilder, javax.persistence.criteria.Root<T>) to provide entity-specific type information and filtering logic.

    Author:
    Krati Trivedi

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      protected javax.persistence.EntityManager entityManager
      The JPA EntityManager used for all database interactions.

      Hook method for populating additional fields on the DTO before persistence.

    • Field Detail

      • entityManager

        protected javax.persistence.EntityManager entityManager
        The JPA EntityManager used for all database interactions. Injected by the persistence context.

    • Constructor Detail

      • BaseDAOImpl

        public BaseDAOImpl()

    • Method Detail

      • getDTOClass

        public abstract java.lang.Class<T> getDTOClass()
        Returns the Class type of the DTO managed by this DAO.

        Must be implemented by each subclass to enable generic JPA operations.

        Returns:
        the Class of the DTO type T

      • getWhereClause

        public abstract java.util.List<javax.persistence.criteria.Predicate> getWhereClause​(T dto,
                                                                                    javax.persistence.criteria.CriteriaBuilder criteriaBuilder,
                                                                                    javax.persistence.criteria.Root<T> qRoot)
        Builds and returns a list of JPA Predicate conditions for filtering search results based on the given DTO's field values.

        Must be implemented by each subclass to define entity-specific search criteria.

        Parameters:
        dto - the DTO containing filter values
        criteriaBuilder - the CriteriaBuilder used to construct predicates
        qRoot - the Root of the criteria query
        Returns:
        a list of Predicate conditions for the WHERE clause

      • populate

        protected void populate​(T dto,
                        UserContext userContext)
        Hook method for populating additional fields on the DTO before persistence.

        Subclasses may override this method to set entity-specific fields based on the current UserContext.

        Parameters:
        dto - the DTO to be populated
        userContext - the current user's context

      • add

        public long add​(T dto,
                UserContext userContext)
        Persists a new DTO record to the database.

        Sets audit fields (createdBy, modifiedBy, createdDateTime, modifiedDateTime) before persisting the entity.

        Specified by:
        add in interface BaseDAOInt<T extends BaseDTO>
        Parameters:
        dto - the DTO to be added
        userContext - the current user's context used for audit fields
        Returns:
        the generated primary key ID of the newly persisted record

      • update

        public void update​(T dto,
                   UserContext userContext)
        Updates an existing DTO record in the database.

        Updates the modifiedBy and modifiedDateTime audit fields before merging.

        Specified by:
        update in interface BaseDAOInt<T extends BaseDTO>
        Parameters:
        dto - the DTO with updated values
        userContext - the current user's context used for audit fields

      • delete

        public void delete​(T dto,
                   UserContext userContext)
        Removes an existing DTO record from the database.
        Specified by:
        delete in interface BaseDAOInt<T extends BaseDTO>
        Parameters:
        dto - the DTO to be deleted
        userContext - the current user's context

      • findByPk

        public T findByPk​(long pk,
                  UserContext userContext)
        Retrieves a single DTO record by its primary key.
        Specified by:
        findByPk in interface BaseDAOInt<T extends BaseDTO>
        Parameters:
        pk - the primary key of the record to find
        userContext - the current user's context
        Returns:
        the found DTO, or null if no record exists with the given key

      • findByUniqueKey

        public T findByUniqueKey​(java.lang.String attribute,
                         java.lang.Object value,
                         UserContext userContext)
        Retrieves a single DTO record matching a specific attribute-value pair.

        Returns the matched record only when exactly one result is found.

        Specified by:
        findByUniqueKey in interface BaseDAOInt<T extends BaseDTO>
        Parameters:
        attribute - the entity attribute name to filter by
        value - the value to match against the given attribute
        userContext - the current user's context
        Returns:
        the matching DTO if exactly one result is found, otherwise null

      • search

        public java.util.List<T> search​(T dto,
                                int pageNo,
                                int pageSize,
                                UserContext userContext)
        Searches for DTO records matching the given criteria with pagination support.

        Uses getWhereClause(T, javax.persistence.criteria.CriteriaBuilder, javax.persistence.criteria.Root<T>) to build entity-specific filter predicates. Pagination is applied only when pageSize is greater than zero.

        Specified by:
        search in interface BaseDAOInt<T extends BaseDTO>
        Parameters:
        dto - the DTO containing search/filter criteria
        pageNo - the zero-based page number to retrieve
        pageSize - the number of records per page; set to 0 to retrieve all
        userContext - the current user's context
        Returns:
        a list of matching DTO records for the specified page

      • search

        public java.util.List<T> search​(T dto,
                                UserContext userContext)
        Searches for all DTO records matching the given criteria without pagination.

        Delegates to search(BaseDTO, int, int, UserContext) with page values of 0.

        Specified by:
        search in interface BaseDAOInt<T extends BaseDTO>
        Parameters:
        dto - the DTO containing search/filter criteria
        userContext - the current user's context
        Returns:
        a list of all matching DTO records

      • marksheetMeritList

        public java.util.List marksheetMeritList​(java.lang.String hql,
                                         UserContext userContext)

      • isEmptyString

        protected boolean isEmptyString​(java.lang.String val)
        Checks whether the given string value is null or blank.
        Parameters:
        val - the string to check
        Returns:
        true if the string is null or contains only whitespace, otherwise false

        Returns:

        Checks whether the given object is not null.

        true if the object is not null, otherwise false
